title: TreeChopper
description: Instantly chops down entire trees with a single axe hit — fast, lag-free and 100 % build-safe!
body:
# TreeChopper

The smartest and most reliable instant tree-felling plugin for Paper 1.21.X

### Features
- Chops the **entire tree** with just one axe hit — works perfectly with every vanilla tree type: oak, spruce, birch, jungle (2×2), dark oak, cherry, mangrove, azalea, crimson & warped stems
- Only activates when holding an axe and **not sneaking**
- **100 % build-safe** — intelligently detects player-made structures and will never destroy houses, wooden builds, farms, or any construction made of logs
- Automatically breaks all leaves after the trunk falls
- Extremely lightweight and lag-free, even on massive dark oak trees
- Zero configuration or permissions needed — drop the jar and it just works
- Built for and tested on Paper 1.21.10

### How to use
1. Equip any axe  
2. Left-click any log while standing (don’t sneak)  
3. Watch the whole tree instantly drop at your feet!
